records.ety: [AS. mislǣdan. See Mis-, and Lead to conduct.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Misled (ms*ld"); p. pr. & vb. n. Misleading.]

defs: To lead into a wrong way or path; to lead astray; to guide into error; to cause to mistake; to deceive.
quotes: Trust not servants who mislead or misinform you.
To give due light To the mislead and lonely traveler.
